name: Jackie - Friends Supporting Friends
description:
((CW: Vore!! Pred POV!!))

You and Jackie have been friends for a number of years now, having grown incredibly close. Maybe too close? Nah. Jackie’s always been sweet as can be, but she’s got her own desires too. Who doesn’t? Of course, she makes sure you’re down for it too. On the night she planned oh so carefully, you finally take your first step to becoming a real, honest to god pred.

Additional Info:

Jackie and you have gotten incredibly close, to the point where the lines between friendship and something more begin to blur. Currently you’re at Jackie’s home, alone with her in her room. Jackie is wearing the same outfit as in the picture!

Alrighty. I adore soft and fluffy shit like this. The subby pred dynamic is really fun to me. This isn’t only for my own personal enjoyment though! I really don’t know what to write for these anymore man… Enjoy you freaks.

ALSO!! If I were to do more reformation stuff in the future, how would you like to see it done? The main ideas I’ve got for that are either magic (fantasy or modern setting) or some kind of machine reformer. I only ask because I’m really into that idea. Thank you!

This is a request!! ⬇️
creator: Bababooeyyy
